articles.author: Jones Hayden
articles.title: Europe being invaded by ‘dangerous ideologies,’ Hegseth warns in D-Day speech - politico.eu
articles.description: “When will European capitals do something about that invasion? Or is ​it too late? I pray not, and I believe not,” U.S. defense chief said at Normandy commemoration.
articles.content:
The D-Day ceremony commemorated the 1944 landings in Normandy, when U.S. and Allied forces crossed the English Channel to launch the liberation of Western Europe from Nazi occupation.

articles.author: Emmy Sasipornkarn
articles.title: France: Veterans mark 82nd anniversary of D-Day in Normandy - DW.com
articles.description: The last living World War II veterans have made the journey to France to commemorate the Normandy landings, which mark the beginning of the Allied campaign to liberate Western Europe from Nazi Germany.
articles.content:
Some of the last surviving veterans gathered in France on Saturday to mark the anniversary of D-Day, 82 years since the Allied landing in Nazi-occupied France during World War II.
